descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-3 in Centennial Cup tier-two western final playoff game, tying series 1-1.
descriptionLong: Jason Phillips scored three goals to lead the Richmond Sockeyes to a 5-3 victory over the Humboldt Broncos in a Centennial Cup junior hockey playoff game on Tuesday. Stan Czenczek and Brian Kozak added goals for the BC champions. The win tied the best-of-seven tier-two western final series at one game each, with game three scheduled for later that night in Humboldt.
